title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Verify that the static import fix for mkdirSync is correctly implemented in src/store/graph.ts, confirm that save() is synchronous with no await expressions, and run the full gate suite to validate the fix.
key_changes: Verify static import of mkdirSync in src/store/graph.ts
Confirm save() function contains no await keywords
Run npm run build to validate TypeScript compilation
Run npm test to confirm regression guard passes
Run npm run lint to verify code quality
Update CLAUDE.md known issues section for CART-B01

review_plan.objective: Verify that the plan for fixing mkdirSync static import in src/store/graph.ts is correct, complete, and all acceptance criteria are independently validated against the actual code.
key_changes: mkdirSync is correctly imported as a top-level static import from fs — no dynamic await import remains
save() is fully synchronous — no await keywords present
npm run build, npm test, npm run lint all pass cleanly
CLAUDE.md has no CART-B01 entry to update — criterion already met
Regression guard test validates mkdirSync call order before writeFileSync
